title: Blue Lace
description: Queen Anne's lace blooms float in drifts of slate and powder blue, with flecks of rust scattered like seed. Salt pulls the pigment into soft, frost-edged clouds that seem to hover above the page.
artistNote: Light and texture emerge naturally from controlled chaos.

title: Night Lace
description: Wild umbels burst in white against a deep, inky ground — salt crystals scattering light through the dark like a meadow at midnight. A study of the delicate structures and tangled rhythms of the botanical world.
artistNote: Each piece begins with a sometimes wild and impulsive ink painting.

title: Fern Study
description: Ferns and a single wild blossom dissolve into a smoke-soft wash of greys, where ink line meets the bloom of salt. Delicate lines dissolve into washes of luminous tone.
artistNote: A study of form and light, infused with a sense of wonder for the natural world.

title: Dandelion Field
description: Seedheads glow like small constellations across a dusky ground, caught in the moment before the wind. Movement, atmosphere, and feeling, built in translucent layers.
artistNote: I honor the beauty of imperfection and the living pulse of the natural world.

title: Night Mountain
description: A dark peak rises beneath a single point of light, the sky washed in falling veils of grey. The same ink-and-salt language of the botanicals, turned toward the quiet of the land.
artistNote: The harmony between structure and spontaneity.

title: Lake at Dusk
description: Pines lean over still water as a pastel sky melts into the lake below. An oil study in warm light and quiet, painted with energy and grace.

title: Gamache's Henri
description: An oil portrait of a German Shepherd, built through layered color and texture to catch not just the likeness but the living energy beneath. One-of-a-kind original — the painting itself, not a print.
artistNote: Less about depiction and more about relationship.

title: Black Cat
description: A black cat emerges from warm light, coat worked in deep blues and violets so the dark reads as color, never flatness. An example of Laurie's pet portraiture, available as a print or as a custom commission.
artistNote: Rendered with empathy and a strong recognition of their individuality and spirit.

title: Australian Shepherd
description: A red-merle Aussie caught mid-grin against summer green, one blue eye and one amber. The kind of likeness that makes a family stop in the hallway. Available as a print or as a custom pet commission.
artistNote: Capturing the presence and personality of the creatures that share our world.

title: Braided Bay
description: A bay horse turned out for the show ring, mane in button braids, painted with a quiet attention to the animal's poise. Equine portraiture available as a print or as a custom commission.
artistNote: The living energy beneath the surface likeness.
